expectations.text: Produces at least 3 distinct user stories
expectations.evidence: Produces 5 distinct stories covering rate/comment, edit, delete, admin dashboard, and admin hide.

expectations.text: Uses the 'I can' phrasing (not 'I want' or 'I need')
expectations.evidence: All stories use 'I can' (e.g., 'I can give a lesson a 1-5 star rating...', 'I can edit the star rating...'). No 'I want' or 'I need' in narratives.

expectations.text: Every story has an explicit Title field separate from the Connextra narrative
expectations.evidence: Each story starts with '**Title:**' line separate from the Connextra block.

expectations.text: Uses Connextra format: every story contains 'As a', 'I can', and 'so that'
expectations.evidence: All five stories have 'As a / I can / so that' triads.

expectations.text: Every story's INVEST check lists each of the six principles (I, N, V, E, S, T) individually with its own verdict — no compact 'all criteria met' one-liner
expectations.evidence: Every story uses the compact one-liner form: '✓ INVEST: all criteria met.' followed by free-form prose. No story itemises I, N, V, E, S, T individually.

expectations.text: Names concrete roles (learner, admin) — does not use generic 'user'
expectations.evidence: Uses 'learner' and 'course admin'. No generic 'user' in narratives.

expectations.text: Handles the web-first/mobile-later platform constraint explicitly
expectations.evidence: Preamble: 'Mobile is explicitly deferred per the PM, so I haven't drafted mobile stories — the web stories below are scoped to web only.' Closing notes: 'Platform scoping: the PM called out "web first, mobile can come later." I've written these as web stories implicitly...'

expectations.text: Does not add Acceptance Criteria (no AC section or bullet list of measurable requirements) — ACs are out of scope
expectations.evidence: No dedicated AC section or bulleted measurable list. The 'Kept out of the narratives (belongs in Acceptance Criteria)' note merely explains what was intentionally left out, which is allowed.
